name: Apple Raspberry Pie-From ?Bb
recipeInstructions:
1. Freeze the flour in a medium bowl for one (1) hour.
2. Refrigerate the lard for one (1) hour, then cut into cubes.
3. In a small bowl, combine vinegar, salt, and water.
4. On a lightly floured surface, measure 1 cup of flour, place lard cubes on top, and gently incorporate with remaining flour using a rolling pin until fully combined. Mix the dry ingredients with the liquid.
5. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface. Roll into a rectangle about 8 X 12 inches. Fold to form an 8-inch square. Fold once more. Wrap in parchment or waxed paper and refrigerate until ready.
6. Peel, core, and cut Granny Smith apples into eighths. Dice crosswise into 1 1/2 inch chunks.
7. Toss apples with lemon juice.
8. In a bowl, blend together the remaining sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves.
9. Add apples and toss until evenly coated.
10. Add raspberries last and toss lightly.
11. Reserve one-third of the dough. Roll out the remaining dough into a round about 5 inches larger than the dish. Place in the dish and trim the overhang to one (1) inch.
12. Spoon the apple mixture into the pie crust, mounding evenly.
13. Roll out the remaining dough, place on top, crimp edges, sprinkle with remaining sugar, and cut five slits in the center of the dough.
14. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes, then lower temperature to 400°F for 40 minutes, turning occasionally to brown evenly. Let cool.
